problem_text_cn: 1110 小空气泡半径$r=0.10\ \mathrm{cm}$，在密度$\rho=0.72\times10^3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$、黏度$\eta=0.11\ \mathrm{Pa\cdot s}$的液体中上升，求其上升的终极速度。（气泡重力可略）
problem_text_en: 1110 A small air bubble has a radius of $r=0.10\ \mathrm{cm}$ and rises in a liquid with density $\rho=0.72\times10^3\ \mathrm{kg/m^3}$ and viscosity $\eta=0.11\ \mathrm{Pa\cdot s}$. Find its terminal velocity when rising. (The gravity of the bubble is negligible)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】气泡上升的终极速度满足**浮力与斯托克斯黏滞力平衡**，由$\dfrac{4}{3}\pi r^3 \rho g = 6\pi r \eta v_e$化简得$v_e=2\rho r^2 g/(9\eta)$，代入数值计算。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】The terminal velocity of the rising bubble satisfies the **balance between buoyancy and Stokes viscous force**. Simplify from $\dfrac{4}{3}\pi r^3 \rho g = 6\pi r \eta v_e$ to get $v_e=2\rho r^2 g/(9\eta)$, and substitute the values for calculation.
